autor: he had to keep moving so that the sinews connected behind his eyes did not slip loose and spin his eyes to the interior of his skull where the scenes waited for him.
explicacao: Citação de he had to keep moving so that the sinews connected behind his eyes did not slip loose and spin his eyes to the interior of his skull where the scenes waited for him. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “He had to keep busy” articula reflexao, leslie-marmon-silko, ceremony em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como ceremony.
